instruction: Create a spinning coin pickup that rotates 90 degrees per second and destroys itself when touched
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_SpinningCoin
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: MultiplyFloat [B=90.0]
NODE n3: MakeRotator [Roll=0, Pitch=0]
NODE n4: AddActorLocalRotation
NODE n5: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n6: DoOnce
NODE n7: PrintString [InString="Coin Collected!"]
NODE n8: DestroyActor

EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Completed -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n8.Execute

DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n2.A [Float]
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.Yaw [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.DeltaRotation [Rotator]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_SpinningCoin
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: MultiplyFloat [B=90.0]
NODE n3: MakeRotator [Roll=0, Pitch=0]
NODE n4: AddActorLocalRotation
NODE n5: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n6: DoOnce
NODE n7: PrintString [InString="Coin Collected!"]
NODE n8: DestroyActor
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n2.A [Float]
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.Yaw [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.DeltaRotation [Rotator]
EXEC n5.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Completed -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n8.Execute
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_SpinningCoin
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: MultiplyFloat [B=90.0]
NODE n3: MakeRotator [Roll=0, Pitch=0]
NODE n4: AddActorLocalRotation
NODE n5: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n6: DoOnce
NODE n7: PrintString [InString="Coin Collected!"]
NODE n8: DestroyActor
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n2.A [Float]
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.Yaw [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.DeltaRotation [Rotator]
EXEC n5.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Completed -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n8.Execute

instruction: Create a timed bomb that prints Armed on start, waits 5 seconds, prints Detonating, then destroys itself
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_TimedBomb
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="Bomb Armed"]
NODE n3: Delay [Duration=5.0]
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Detonating!"]
NODE n5: DestroyActor

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Completed -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n5.Execute

instruction: Create a damage zone that deals 10 damage per second using a timer. Track Health starting at 100 and print the remaining health each tick
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_DamageZone
PARENT: Actor

VAR Health: Float = 100.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: SetTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="DealDamage", Time=1.0, bLooping=true]
NODE n3: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="DealDamage"]
NODE n4: GetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n5: SubtractFloat [B=10.0]
NODE n6: SetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n7: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute

DATA n4.Value -> n5.A [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Value [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n7.InString [String]

instruction: Create a health regeneration system with a Health variable starting at 50. On Tick, add 5 times DeltaSeconds to Health, clamp it between 0 and 100, and print the current health
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_HealthRegen
PARENT: Actor

VAR Health: Float = 50.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n3: MultiplyFloat [B=5.0]
NODE n4: AddFloat
NODE n5: ClampFloat [Min=0.0, Max=100.0]
NODE n6: SetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n7: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute

DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n2.Value -> n4.A [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.B [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.Value [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Value [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n7.InString [String]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_HealthRegen
PARENT: Actor

VAR Health: Float = 50.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n3: MultiplyFloat [B=5.0]
NODE n4: AddFloat
NODE n5: ClampFloat [Min=0.0, Max=100.0]
NODE n6: SetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n7: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute

DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n2.Value -> n4.A [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.B [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.Value [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Value [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n7.InString [String]
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_HealthRegen
PARENT: Actor

VAR Health: Float = 50.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n3: MultiplyFloat [B=5.0]
NODE n4: AddFloat
NODE n5: ClampFloat [Min=0.0, Max=100.0]
NODE n6: SetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n7: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute

DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n2.Value -> n4.A [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.B [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.Value [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Value [Float]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n7.InString [String]

instruction: Build an event gate system. On BeginPlay open the gate. When an actor overlaps, enter the gate and print Access Granted on exit. On pressing Disable close the gate and print System Disabled
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_EventGate
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: Gate
NODE n3: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Access Granted"]
NODE n5: Event_InputAction [ActionName="Disable"]
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="System Disabled"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Open
EXEC n3.Then -> n2.Enter
EXEC n2.Exit -> n4.Execute
EXEC n5.Pressed -> n2.Close
EXEC n5.Pressed -> n6.Execute
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_EventGate
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: Gate
NODE n3: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Access Granted"]
NODE n5: Event_InputAction [ActionName="Disable"]
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="System Disabled"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Open
EXEC n3.Then -> n2.Enter
EXEC n2.Exit -> n4.Execute
EXEC n5.Pressed -> n2.Close
EXEC n5.Pressed -> n6.Execute
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_EventGate
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: Gate
NODE n3: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Access Granted"]
NODE n5: Event_InputAction [ActionName="Disable"]
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="System Disabled"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Open
EXEC n3.Then -> n2.Enter
EXEC n2.Exit -> n4.Execute
EXEC n5.Pressed -> n2.Close
EXEC n5.Pressed -> n6.Execute

instruction: Create a rotating platform with a configurable RotationSpeed variable defaulting to 45. On Tick, rotate the actor by RotationSpeed times DeltaSeconds degrees on the yaw axis
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_RotatingPlatform
PARENT: Actor

VAR RotationSpeed: Float = 45.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=RotationSpeed]
NODE n3: MultiplyFloat
NODE n4: MakeRotator [Roll=0, Pitch=0]
NODE n5: AddActorLocalRotation

EXEC n1.Then -> n5.Execute

DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n2.Value -> n3.B [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Yaw [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.DeltaRotation [Rotator]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_RotatingPlatform
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=RotationSpeed]
NODE n3: MultiplyFloat
NODE n4: MakeRotator [Roll=0, Pitch=0]
NODE n5: AddActorLocalRotation

EXEC n1.Then -> n5.Execute

DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n2.Value -> n3.B [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Yaw [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.DeltaRotation [Rotator]
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_RotatingPlatform
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=RotationSpeed]

NODE n4: MakeRotator [Roll=0, Pitch=0]
NODE n5: AddActorLocalRotation

DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n2.Value -> n3.B [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Yaw [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.DeltaRotation [Rotator]
